untranslatable_reason: The 'Below the Stomach' candlestick pattern is a visual/morphological formation that cannot be expressed as mathematical conditions using only the allowed price-based indicators. The pattern requires visual identification of specific candlestick shapes and their relative positioning. Additionally, the signal lacks specific entry criteria (pattern detection method), exact stop-loss placement, and profit target computation (all marked AUTHOR_SILENT). The breakout direction is bidirectional (BOTH), requiring separate logic for upside and downside breakouts that cannot be deterministically defined without pattern recognition capabilities.
translation_notes: Breakout timeframe specified as 3-5 days; exit window 6-8 days (median). Body direction used as proxy for upward (positive body) vs downward (negative body) breakout attempt. Pattern detection itself cannot be operationalized without visual/morphological indicators or machine learning. Recommend implementing custom pattern recognition function or using candlestick pattern library external to this rules engine.
